title: Work as a delivery courier on MNMKNK
intro: A quick intro page before signing up: learn how the system works and what you need to get started.
tip1: Enable location sharing so nearby delivery offers reach you automatically.
tip2: Enable available for orders from the courier dashboard settings.
tip3: After accepting an order, you can open the map with one tap and update the order status easily.
iosNote: On iPhone: open the Share button in Safari then select "Add to Home Screen" to install the courier app.
note: Note: Registration is a join request, and the account is activated after admin review.
f1Body: You'll receive the closest delivery offers to your location, and the first courier to accept gets the order assigned.
f2Body: If you enable location sharing, the system will automatically update your location so you never miss an order.
f3Body: You can track orders, collect cash (COD), and update order status from the courier dashboard.
f4Body: After registration, your account will be under review by the admin before activation.
faq1Q: Do I have to enable location?
faq1A: Highly recommended. Without location, you might miss many offers because the system can't match you with nearby orders.
faq2Q: Can I start immediately after registration?
faq2A: Your account will be under review, and after approval you can log in and access the courier dashboard.

settingsTab.subtitle: Control refresh preferences and account info.
settingsTab.locationNotShared: Location sharing is disabled. Enable it so nearby offers reach you automatically.

settingsTab.locationUnsupported: Location is not supported on this device/browser.

tabDesc.offers: Nearby orders. The first courier to accept gets the order assigned.
